% Intensive-margin Bosman effect across FE structures (auto-generated)
\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Intensive margin: Bosman effect on the standardised match rating across fixed-effects structures.}
  \label{tab:intensive-fe}
  \begin{tabular}{lrr}
    \toprule
    Fixed-effects structure & Estimate (SD) & $p$ \\
    \midrule
    Player $+$ month                     & $+0.045$ & ${<}0.001$ \\
    Player $+$ league\,$\times$\,month   & $+0.039$ & $0.0023$ \\
    Spell $+$ month                      & $+0.008$ & $0.54$ \\
    Spell $+$ league\,$\times$\,month    & $+0.012$ & $0.39$ \\
    \midrule
    Source-league sample (player $+$ month) & $+0.042$ & ${<}0.001$ \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}

  \vspace{4pt}
  {\footnotesize\itshape Note: outcome is the monthly rating standardised within
  league\,$\times$\,season; SE clustered by player. Minimum detectable effect
  ($80\%$ power) $\approx 0.04$ SD. ``Spell'' denotes player-by-contract-spell
  fixed effects.\par}
\end{table}
